creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad Our Story with David Attenborough at the @natural_history_museum, created in collaboration with @openplanetorg, is playing until 30th August and tickets are still available!

AND just for the month of May, an incredible, FREE experience has just opened in London, for Sir David Attenborough’s 100th birthday! They have partnered with @outernetglobal to bring you amazing visuals from the experience for a 5-minute production, delving into an inspiring story about our planet and people. 
🎟️ FREE to see, no need to book tickets, just turn up
📍 Outernet London, Charing Cross Rd, London, WC2H 8LH
🗓️ Open until the end of May. If you miss it, you can watch the full 50 min experience at the Natural History Museum until 30th August, with off peak adult tickets from £20

geo_locations: Outernet London, Charing Cross Rd, London, WC2H 8LH
pinned_places: Outernet London, Charing Cross Rd, London, WC2H 8LH

transcription.text: And this is where our story begins. There's a brand new Sir David Attenborough experience in London and it is completely free. It's open now for Sir David Attenborough's 100th birthday at Outernet and you'll delve into the story of our planet and our people, the threats we face and a vision of London where humanity and nature thrive. It is absolutely inspirational and you're left with Sir David's message that we hold the power to write the next chapter and it will be on throughout May. And if you don't get to see it or you just want to continue the journey, the full 50-minute production is being shown at the Natural History Museum until the 30th of August. Guys, we have seen it and it is incredible. So make sure you head down and find all the details in the caption.
